reviews.review_description:
Cody and I built this really quickly. We wanted to build something where people could build maps with friends and move around them with just hand-tracked locomotion.

Let us know what you think!

I just started playing the game as soon as I saw it came out, and after just a few minutes, although there’s a few bugs, its so awesome how it was made during a week. I’m currently writing this review while playing with you (Jordan) and a few other friends, and let me just tell you, the game is awesome and cool, I’m just hoping that there can be maps added or maps that we can make so we could make it harder. 
I enjoy this game so much even though it just came out, the bugs are kind of annoying but for me and my friends, they’re just funny for us and make us laugh even more!

If you check it out early like i did you might get to meet the owner Jordan!

The Derby team are gonna make a super super fun game where you can create and hang with friends. And you wont need controllers!! Download this and stay tuned!!
It's awesome how much they were able to achieve in just a week. I love the concept of the game and am really looking forwards to watching the game to progress into a masterpiece.
Fun, clean, simple social world where you can jump around like a gorilla with no controllers. Great dev team.
For a demo, it really has a lot of potential, and I'm really looking forward to it in the future!
If you have ever wanted to play gorilla tag with hand tracking this is the game for you

reviews.review_title: Awesome way to game with friends
reviews.review_description: Cool space and mechanics, I love hanging out with my friends in here
met a friend using apple vision pro and competed to see who could climb faster!
Just like gorilla tag movement and is a good game

I love the idea of a completely hand tracking game and the fact that people will be able to build maps makes this a fun and incredibly up coming game! Can’t wait to see what the games is gonna look like later.
The greatest place on Quest for maps and chats
But you use your hand and it’s pretty cool
